name: Chewy Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a medium bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Stir in egg, then mix in flour, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, and salt until well combined.
4. Shape dough into small balls and place on ungreased baking sheets.
5. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until edges are lightly golden brown.
6. Let cool on wire racks before serving.
